PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\" -File | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize; "---"; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\settings.json" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell(Copy-Item "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json.bak" -Force; "Backup created"; "---"; $cfg = Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $cfg.mcpServers.playwright.args = @\("@playwright/mcp@latest", "--isolated"\); $cfg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 32 | Set-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Encoding UTF8; "Updated"; "---"; \(Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).mcpServers.playwright | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://oktatas-portal.vercel.app" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "root: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "root: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://oktatas-portal.vercel.app/api/mobile/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"student@demo.hu","password":"password"}'; "login: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "login: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 8081,8082,3000 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://oktatas-portal.vercel.app/api/mobile/login" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8 -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"student@demo.hu","password":"password"}'; "Vercel login: $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120,$r.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { "Vercel login: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://152.66.170.68:3000/login" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Lokál \(LAN IP\): $\($r.StatusCode\) OK" } catch { "Lokál \(LAN IP\): $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) - $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://152.66.170.68:8081/status" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "BME LAN reachable: HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "BME LAN unreachable: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/oktatas?schema=public"; $tokenJson = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/mobile/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"student@demo.hu","password":"password"}'; $token = $tokenJson.token; $assignments = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/mobile/attendance" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }\).assignments; $assignments | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/mobile/attendance" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" } -Body \(@{ assignmentId = $_.id; latitude = \(47.4733 + \(Get-Random -Minimum -0.001 -Maximum 0.001\)\); longitude = \(19.0594 + \(Get-Random -Minimum -0.001 -Maximum 0.001\)\); source = "gps" } | ConvertTo-Json\) | Out-Null }; "Inserted check-ins for student. Existing assignments: $\($assignments.Count\)")

PowerShell($env:DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/oktatas?schema=public"; 'DELETE FROM "Attendance";' | Out-File -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\wipe-att.sql" -Encoding utf8; pnpm --filter @repo/db exec prisma db execute --schema=prisma/schema.prisma --file="$env:TEMP\\wipe-att.sql" --url=$env:DATABASE_URL 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)
